name: selectpop
description: Portable Windows text selection toolbar built with Electron.

scripts.test: node --test main/webdav-sync.test.js main/launch-on-boot.test.js main/config.test.js main/copy-app-rules.test.js main/installed-apps.test.js main/selection-foreground-guard.test.js main/ai-window-policy.test.js main/popup-auto-hide.test.js main/popup-layout.test.js main/selection-popup-controller.test.js main/clipboard.test.js main/helper-runtime-controller.test.js main/native-client.test.js main/ai/web-translators.test.js
scripts.pack:portable: npm run build:native && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.yml --win portable --x64
scripts.dist:portable: npm run build:native && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.yml --win portable --x64 && node scripts/dist-portable.mjs
